metadata.title: RepoCensus — canonical CIM-0 repository census artifact

description: Complete repository census artifact — the canonical CIM-0 output format (src/body/services/cim/models.py). Pydantic BaseModel. Already self-versioning via RepoCensusMetadata (run_id, timestamp, core_version, schema_id='core.cim.repo_census', schema_version='1.0.0'). All lists are sorted for determinism. Required sub-objects: RepoCensusMetadata, RepoInfo, TreeStats, ArchitecturalSignals, CensusSummary — all Pydantic models in the same file. Optional lists: execution_surfaces (list[ExecutionSurface]), mutation_surfaces (list[MutationSurface]), errors (list[CensusError]). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 Session 1.

metadata.description: RepoCensusMetadata — run_id, timestamp, core_version, schema_id, schema_version.

signals.description: ArchitecturalSignals — has_src, has_intent, has_sql, has_tests, has_docs, dependency_files.

summary.description: CensusSummary — aggregated statistics for quick consumption. Prevents consumers from parsing mutation_surfaces arrays directly.

execution_surfaces.description: List of ExecutionSurface — detected entry points (path, type, line). Default empty list.

mutation_surfaces.description: List of MutationSurface — detected mutation capabilities (path, type, operation, line, detail, write_zone, lane, allowlisted). Default empty list.

errors.description: List of CensusError — non-fatal errors during census (path, error_type, message). Default empty list.
